offGrid.metaTitle: Off-Grid Cabins in Bulgaria | Eco Stays & Digital Detox | Drift & Dwells
offGrid.metaDescription: Two unique eco stays in the Bulgarian mountains. True off-grid cabins for comfort, silence, and real disconnection. The Cabin & The Valley.
offGrid.h1: Off-Grid Cabins in Bulgaria to Truly Unplug
offGrid.intro: Off-grid here means comfort, not survival. Solar power, wood stoves, and spring water—with the silence and stars you came for.

cabinVsValley.title: The Cabin vs The Valley
cabinVsValley.cabin: The Cabin: Cosy off-grid mountain hideaway for two. No wifi, wood stove, deep silence. Near Bachevo in the Rhodopes.
cabinVsValley.valley: The Valley: Mountain village at 1,550m with A-frames and Stone House. Starlink in the Stone House, full workation option.

digitalDetox.title: Digital Detox—What It Actually Means
digitalDetox.body: No screens in the cabin. Books, fire, walks, and real conversation. You leave with a reset, not a to-do list.

location.title: Location & How to Get There
location.body: Both stays are in the Rhodope and Pirin regions. Sofia, Plovdiv, and Bansko are the main gateways. High clearance recommended for The Cabin; 4x4 or ATV transfer for The Valley.

links.cabinCardTitle: The Cabin: Cosy off-grid mountain hideaway

rhodopes.metaTitle: Cabin Retreat in the Rhodopes | Hikes, Villages & Nature | Drift & Dwells
rhodopes.metaDescription: The Rhodopes as a destination: hikes, villages, and two stays to slow down. Practical travel tips and routes.
rhodopes.h1: Cabin Retreat in the Rhodopes: Nature, Villages & Silence
rhodopes.whyRhodopes: The Rhodopes are quieter than the crowded ski resorts. Wild meadows, forests, and villages that move at a different pace.

links.bookCabin: Book The Cabin in the Rhodopes

bansko.metaTitle: Cabin Near Bansko | Workation & Reset | Drift & Dwells
bansko.metaDescription: Cabin escape near Bansko: nature and silence with access to the nomad scene. Perfect for workation or reset.
bansko.h1: Cabin Near Bansko for Workation & Reset
bansko.whyBansko: Bansko has grown into a remote-work hub: coworking, coliving, and nomad events. But when you need to disconnect, a cabin in the mountains is the flip side.

twoPaths.title: Two Paths
twoPaths.community: Community: Coworking days, events, nomad meetups in Bansko.
twoPaths.disconnect: Disconnect: Cabin life—silence, focus, and outdoor time.

paidStaysBulgaria.metaTitle: Choose your off-grid stay in Bulgaria | Drift & Dwells
paidStaysBulgaria.metaDescription: Four distinct stays in Bulgaria — The Cabin, Valley A-Frame, Stone House, and Lux Cabin. Pick what fits you and check availability directly.

hero.title: Choose your off-grid stay in Bulgaria
hero.subhead: Four distinct stays. Pick the one that fits you and check availability directly.

compact.title: Off-grid stays in Bulgaria
compact.subline: Four stays · Check dates on the next step

reviews.caption: Rated by guests on Airbnb, Booking.com, TripAdvisor — and direct stays.

comparison.title: Which one fits you?
comparison.hint: A quick read — not a spreadsheet.

the-cabin.title: The Cabin
the-cabin.fitLine: For couples who want the rawest and most remote version.
facts: Rugged mountain access — plan for the approach
No mains electricity — solar and gas only
Phone signal is thin to none

valley-a-frame.title: The Valley A-Frame
valley-a-frame.fitLine: For couples who want off-grid with comfort and mountain views.

comparison.privacy: Private cabin among a small cluster

valley-stone-house.title: The Valley Stone House
valley-stone-house.fitLine: For groups or families who want character, history, and more space.
facts: Room to spread out indoors and out

valley-lux-cabin.title: The Valley Lux Cabin
valley-lux-cabin.fitLine: For guests who want the most comfortable Valley stay.

retreatVenue.metaTitle: Retreat Venue Bulgaria | Private Mountain Setting | Drift & Dwells
retreatVenue.metaDescription: Host your retreat in the Bulgarian mountains. Quiet setting, nature, and privacy. Request availability and capacity.
retreatVenue.h1: Retreat Venue in Bulgaria: Silence, Nature & Privacy
retreatVenue.offer: Privacy, scenery, and a pace that supports workshops, yoga, and creative work. Capacity and seasonality vary—we work with small groups.
retreatVenue.howItWorks: Request availability and capacity. We respond within 48 hours with options and pricing.
